title: Cotton String Ball, 3 Pack - 100% Cotton Roll Without Added Plastics, Wrapping, Arts and Crafts, Meat Tying, Baking, Garden, Handicrafts, Butcher Twine DIY 3X60M Approx Off-White
features: 🧶🏠🥩🌿 A HOME ESSENTIAL - Each cotton twine ball Is Made From 100% Natural woven cotton String. Woven From Multiple Strands Of Cotton making it strong And durable; Perfect for Kitchen, Home and craft use. The twine is Soft and will not easily break. Suitable For Baking Cooking Sewing DIY Handmade Arts Crafts Wrapping Presents Decorating Gardening Application And More
🧶🏠🥩🌿 FOOD SAFE KITCHEN TWINE - Suitable for use in many culinary tasks such as trussing a turkey or roast, making sausages, tying poultry or meat

🧶🏠🥩🌿 MULTIPURPOSE CREATIVE TWINE - Works perfectly for arts and craft projects, bookbinding, gift decorations, even suitable for making candle wicks! Cotton string comes in many colours and is perfect for gift wrapping
🧶🏠🥩🌿 GARDENING TWINE - Cotton Twine makes for a perfect gardening companion great for bundling And recycling tying up vine plants and vegetables with no chemical damage. Create a Macramé Plant Hanger

🧶🏠🥩🌿 Package Included: The Package Included Set Of 3 Cotton Twine Size Of String Is 3x60m Total 180m Approx. The Colour is of 100% Natural Cotton, no added plastics making it suitable for most uses, where extra strength is required we advise to double up
